description: Design a smooth, kidney-shaped cam plate in the XY plane using a cubic spline through waypoints (0, 30), (28, 10), (20, -18), (0, -22), (-15, -8), and (-22, 18). The profile must be a smooth closed curve with no sharp corners or straight lines. Extrude the sketch to a depth of 10 mm and save the model to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/cam_plate.slvs.
